masked_case_json.world_change: a construction-and-services company is re-rated as a beneficiary of a hot power/data-center infrastructure theme, and a recent acquisition appears to increase thematic exposure. the company then reports a broad execution miss and guidance disappointment driven by cost pressure and problems away from the fashionable segment.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Underlying: Primoris Q1 2026. Primary source: company earnings release. A correct decision blocks a long because thematic exposure does not offset company-specific execution and cost failures. Do not expose this field to the model during decision generation.
